caption: The video features a man standing on stage, addressing an audience with a microphone in front of him. He is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest adorned with colorful embroidery, including a red design that resembles a shark or fish. The man appears to be speaking or singing, as his mouth is open and he seems engaged in delivering his message. In the background, wooden blinds cover the windows, creating a warm and intimate setting. The audience, partially visible in the foreground, is attentively listening to the performer. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, suggesting that the event may be related to this organization. The overall atmosphere suggests a live performance or presentation, possibly involving music given the presence of a guitar resting against the stand beside the man.
